title: Operational Recommendations for DNSSEC Delegation Signer (DS) Automation
abstract: Enabling support for automatic acceptance of DNSSEC Delegation Signer (DS) parameters from the Child DNS operator (via RFCs 7344, 8078, and 9615) requires the Parental Agent, often a registry or registrar, to make a number of technical decisions around acceptance checks, error and success reporting, and multi-party issues such as concurrent updates. This document describes recommendations about how these points are best addressed in practice.
